text: Massive pothole on 80 feet road Koramangala near Sony World signal. Two-wheelers falling daily. @BBMP_MAYOR please fix! #BangaloreRoads
author: @koramangala_resident

text: No water supply in Indiranagar 12th main for 3 days now. BWSSB tanker hasn't come either. Families struggling. #BangaloreWater
author: @indiranagar_voices

text: Garbage dump overflowing outside Jayanagar 4th block shopping complex for 5 days. BBMP SWM completely failed. @BBMP_MAYOR
author: @jayanagar_cares

text: Power cut in Whitefield for 8 hours today. BESCOM gave no prior notice. WFH professionals badly affected. @BESCOMofficial
author: @whitefield_hub

text: Entire stretch of Sarjapur Road waterlogged after last night's rain. Office traffic completely stuck since morning. @BBMP_MAYOR
author: @sarjapur_daily

text: Street light not working on HSR Layout 5th sector main road for 2 weeks. Very unsafe at night. Please fix @BBMP
author: @hsr_resident

text: Road digging by BWSSB on Bannerghatta road half-done for 3 months. No barricades. Pedestrians in danger. @CMofKarnataka
author: @bannerghatta_citizen

text: Cubbon Park benches broken, pathways cracked, no maintenance visible. Such a shame for Bangalore's lungs. @BBMP_MAYOR
author: @cubbon_park_walker

text: Traffic signal at KR Puram junction not working from morning. Peak hour chaos. Cops nowhere to be seen. #Bangalore
author: @krpuram_commuter

text: Water pipe burst on MG Road near Trinity metro. Water wasting for 2 days. BWSSB not responding to calls. @BWSSB_official
author: @mg_road_watch

text: Garbage truck hasn't visited Malleshwaram 3rd cross in 10 days. Residents have nowhere to dump waste. Stray animals making it worse.
author: @malleshwaram_civic

text: Footpath on Lavelle Road completely encroached by vendors and bikes. Pedestrians forced onto the road. Very dangerous. @BBMP
author: @lavelle_rd_walker

text: BESCOM transformer exploded in JP Nagar 6th phase last night. 200+ homes without power. No ETA for repair. @BESCOMofficial
author: @jpnagar_resident

text: Drain overflowing near BTM Layout 2nd stage. Raw sewage on roads. Children in the area at health risk. @BBMP_MAYOR please act!
author: @btm_community

text: Pothole on Outer Ring Road near Marathahalli bridge swallowed a scooter wheel last evening. Serious accident risk. #BangaloreRoads
author: @marathahalli_news

text: Water tanker mafia active in Yelahanka new town. BWSSB not supplying, private tankers charging Rs 1200/trip. Who do we complain to?
author: @yelahanka_voices

text: Construction debris dumped on Rajajinagar main road narrowing it to single lane. Been here 3 weeks. Traffic nightmares daily.
author: @rajajinagar_page

text: Lalbagh lake water turning green with algae. No maintenance, no aeration. BBMP Horticulture where are you? @BBMP_MAYOR
author: @lalbagh_friend

text: No bus service on route 201 from Electronic City for 2 hours this evening. BMTC gave no info. Workers stranded. @BMTC_Bengaluru
author: @ecity_commuter

text: Hebbal flyover underpass completely flooded. Cars submerged. This happens every single rain. BBMP storm drains never get cleared. #Bengaluru
author: @hebbal_watcher
